content:
# Multi Phase Flow

**Summary**: The simultaneous flow of two or more fluids (e.g., oil and gas, water and oil) in a pipe.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2009]] studied the behavior of multi-phase flow through chokes.

- [[2011-al-shammari|Al-Shammari, 2011]] analyzed multi-phase flow to determine the impact of varying gas volumes on pressure drop.

## Scientific Context

- [[2009-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2009]] Standard condition in oil and gas production.

- [[2011-al-shammari|Al-Shammari, 2011]] analyzed multi-phase flow to determine the impact of varying gas volumes on pressure drop.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Flow rates were measured in Barrels Per Day (BPD). ([[2009-al-khalifa|Al-Khalifa, 2009, p. 134]])


- Flow patterns (bubble, slug, churn, annular) significantly complicate pressure drop calculations due to changes in liquid holdup and mixture density. ([[2011-al-shammari|Al-Shammari, 2011, p. 13]])
